mapper.select:
SELECT t.train_cd AS trainCd, t.train_number AS trainNumber, t.train_type_cd AS trainTypeCd, tt.train_type_name AS trainTypeName,
pf.arrival_station_cd AS fromStationCd, sf.station_name AS fromStationName,
pt.arrival_station_cd AS toStationCd, st.station_name AS toStationName,
pf.departure_time AS departureTime, pt.arrival_time AS arrivalTime
FROM M_PLAN pf JOIN M_PLAN pt ON pt.train_cd = pf.train_cd JOIN M_TRAIN t ON t.train_cd = pf.train_cd JOIN M_TRAIN_TYPE tt ON tt.train_type_cd = t.train_type_cd JOIN M_STATION sf ON sf.station_cd = pf.arrival_station_cd JOIN M_STATION st ON st.station_cd = pt.arrival_station_cd
WHERE pf.arrival_station_cd = #{fromStationCd} AND pt.arrival_station_cd = #{toStationCd} AND pf.departure_time < pt.arrival_time
ORDER BY pf.departure_time

SELECT t.train_cd AS trainCd, t.train_number AS trainNumber, t.train_type_cd AS trainTypeCd, tt.train_type_name AS trainTypeName,
pf.arrival_station_cd AS fromStationCd, sf.station_name AS fromStationName,
pt.arrival_station_cd AS toStationCd, st.station_name AS toStationName,
pf.departure_time AS departureTime, pt.arrival_time AS arrivalTime
FROM M_PLAN pf JOIN M_PLAN pt ON pt.train_cd = pf.train_cd JOIN M_TRAIN t ON t.train_cd = pf.train_cd JOIN M_TRAIN_TYPE tt ON tt.train_type_cd = t.train_type_cd JOIN M_STATION sf ON sf.station_cd = pf.arrival_station_cd JOIN M_STATION st ON st.station_cd = pt.arrival_station_cd
WHERE t.train_cd = #{trainCd} AND pf.arrival_station_cd = #{fromStationCd} AND pt.arrival_station_cd = #{toStationCd} AND pf.departure_time < pt.arrival_time
SELECT departure_time AS departureTime, track_number AS trackNumber FROM M_PLAN WHERE train_cd = #{trainCd} AND arrival_station_cd = #{stationCd}
SELECT train_type_cd FROM M_TRAIN WHERE train_cd = #{trainCd}
SELECT DISTINCT mst.seat_type_cd, mst.seat_name FROM M_TRAIN_CAR mtc JOIN M_SEAT_TYPE mst ON mtc.seat_type_cd = mst.seat_type_cd WHERE mtc.train_cd = #{trainCd}
SELECT SUM(max_seat_number) FROM M_TRAIN_CAR WHERE train_cd = #{trainCd} AND seat_type_cd = #{seatTypeCd}
